entries.name: schema-create-after-connection-grabs-table-not-connection
entries.description: E4: Schema::connection('payroll')->create('payroll_entity_report_presets', ...) must report the TABLE name, not the connection arg.

entries.name: schema-create-direct-form-still-works
entries.description: E4: bare Schema::create('users', ...) keeps reporting 'users' when after_token used.

entries.name: try-catch-already-exists-counts-as-idempotent
entries.description: E4: Laravel multi-tenant try { Schema::create(...) } catch with 'already exists' branch is a recognised idempotency idiom.

entries.name: try-catch-pgsql-42P07-counts-as-idempotent
entries.description: E4: PostgreSQL SQLSTATE 42P07 (table already exists) check is a guard.

entries.name: plain-try-without-already-exists-is-not-idempotent
entries.description: E4: try/catch alone (no 'already exists' branch) is NOT a guard — could still be a real missing-guard bug.
entries.input: try { Schema::create('x', fn ($t) => null); } catch (\Throwable $e) { Log::error($e); }

entries.name: ancestor-constructor-auth-found-via-extends
entries.description: E2: EmployeeController extends DynamicResourceController; parent's __construct adds $this->middleware('auth'). Inheritance walker must find it.

input.source:
<?php
namespace App\Http\Controllers;
class EmployeeController extends DynamicResourceController {
  public function index() { return Employee::paginate(); }
}

class_source_map.DynamicResourceController:
<?php
class DynamicResourceController extends Controller {
  public function __construct() { $this->middleware('auth'); }
}

entries.name: ancestor-without-auth-is-not-protected
entries.description: E2: parent class exists but its __construct does NOT add auth — child should not be treated as protected via inheritance.

input.source:
<?php
class Foo extends Bar { public function index() {} }

entries.name: ancestor-two-levels-deep
entries.description: E2: Foo extends Bar extends Baz, Baz adds auth. Walker must recurse past 1 level.

input.source:
<?php
class Foo extends Bar { public function index() {} }

entries.name: over-fetch-inheritModelFields-is-shape-protected
entries.description: E5: body that calls inheritModelFields() (DynamicResourceController shaper) should not be flagged as raw model return.

entries.name: over-fetch-paginate-through-callback-is-shape-protected
entries.description: E5: paginate()->through(fn ($x) => ...) is the canonical Laravel-paginate transform. Body is shape-protected.

entries.name: over-fetch-DTO-build-is-shape-protected
entries.description: E5: EmployeeDto::fromModel(...) is a DTO assembly — shape-protected.

entries.name: over-fetch-parent-delegate-is-shape-protected
entries.description: E5: `return parent::index();` trusts the parent class shaping.

entries.name: over-fetch-bare-return-of-model-is-NOT-shape-protected
entries.description: Negative: a body that just returns the model with no shape signal must still be flaggable.
